Shrek Jr.

Press Submit Weekend

✦ Weekly Classes · September–June

World-Class Training,
Five Days a Week

From Tiny Tots taking their first steps on stage to Teen Conservatory students pursuing professional careers — we offer classes for every age, level, and discipline, Monday through Saturday.

✦ Our Programs

Find Your Perfect Program

From first steps on stage to professional-level conservatory training — every program is built to ignite a lifelong love of performing arts.

🌟
Ages 13–18 · Audition-Based
Teen Conservatory
Intensive, professional-track training in acting, dance, voice, and musical theatre. Includes our dual-enrollment (DE) program and conservatory productions.
Explore Program
🎯
All Ages · Private & Group
Coaching
One-on-one and small-group coaching for audition prep, acting technique, vocal performance, and on-camera work.
Explore Program
🎭
Ages 2–18 · Year-Round
Classes & Productions
Dance, theatre, voice, musical theatre, and film — weekly classes Monday through Saturday plus three Stagelighter production companies.
View Full Schedule
🎬
Ages 18+ · All Levels Welcome
Adult Classes & Shows
Acting fundamentals, adult dance, musical theatre, and a spring cabaret production. It is never too late to take the stage.
Explore Program
✦ What Families Say

Real Stories, Real Transformations

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Our child is participating in her 5th Broadway Bound this year. The annual summer camp is something she has looked forward to every year since taking her first bow in 2021. Thank you for doing what you do. Broadway Bound is successful not because of its location, but the people in it.

JE
Jacklyn Esquerra
Parent · Broadway Bound Summer Camp
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

My daughter is loving Broadway Bound! Her love for the program is far exceeding my expecations. I knew she loved to perform, but she has been actively singing the songs and practicing at home every morning without me prompting. Your crew has very quickly built a passion in her that I am hopeful lasts a lifetime. I have been truly impressed!

MR
Megan Rosh
Parent · Broadway Bound Summer Camp
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

My Daughter LOVES your camp more than any other camp she’s ever been a part of in the summer. The genuine care and concern comes through to the kids and they feel the love of the cast, crew and directors.

JV
Jenevieve Vogue
Parent · Broadway Bound Summer Camp
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

It was such a fun experience! The best theater summer camp there is in my opinion!

TC
Tyler Craft
Student · Broadway Bound Summer Camp
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

My daughters had such a wonderful first-year experience - it was definitely one of the best summer camps that they've ever particpated in. The teachers and interns are energetic, engaging, and passionate - you all created a fun, safe, and inviting environment for children to learn, collaborate, and build confidence. My daughter was struggling with stage frieght and this summer camp helped her tremendously in overcoing that fear. We can't wait to for our next experience with you!

NC
Nancy Chu
Parent · Broadway Bound Summer Camp
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

Our daughter was confident and comfortable in her role and I can't even begin to thank you enough for bringing that out in her. She is already asking when she can sign up for the next program! Thank you so much from the bottom of my heart. So grateful to all of you!!!

KM
Kanages Mohler
Parent · Broadway Bound Summer Camp
✦ Where To Find Us

Classes at the
National Conference Center

All 2026–2027 classes are held at our primary studio at 18980 Upper Belmont Place, Leesburg, VA — with an exciting move on the horizon.

🏛️

Coming Soon: New Creative Arts Center

We are in serious final negotiations for a brand-new 10,000 sq ft Creative Arts Center in the heart of Ashburn , planned to open by Labor Day Weekend 2026 — just in time for the new season!

📍 National Conference Center 18980 Upper Belmont Place
Leesburg, VA 20176 Get Directions →
